/tmp/codeql-scratch-89cd5982bd6654f4/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/svdb_vm.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libsvdb_vm.so.1 -o /home/runner/work/sqlvibe/sqlvibe/.build/cmake/lib/libsvdb_vm.so.1.0.0 CMakeFiles/svdb_vm.dir/hash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/svdb_vm.dir/compare.cpp.o CMakeFiles/svdb_vm.dir/sort.cpp.o CMakeFiles/svdb_vm.dir/expr_eval.cpp.o CMakeFiles/svdb_vm.dir/vm_dispatch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/svdb_vm.dir/type_conv.cpp.o CMakeFiles/svdb_vm.dir/string_funcs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/svdb_vm.dir/datetime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/svdb_vm.dir/aggregate.cpp.o
